Name: Stage Keys
Author: Beennnn
Description: Full-colour sound-select icons for the live keyboardist — one Stream Deck key per voice, covering the complete General MIDI / XP sound set (128 programs across 16 families: pianos, e-pianos, organs, guitars, basses, strings, brass, reeds, pipes, synths, ethnic, mallets, percussion & FX). Recognise the sound at a glance under stage lighting, no menu-diving.
